title: rapanea coclensis
intro: Rapanea coclensis, also known as the Panama bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rapanea coclensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Rapanea coclensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
